name: AI-skills
description: A collection of reusable API design skills, covering framework-agnostic API principles and Django REST Framework execution guidance.

plugins.name: api-design-principles
plugins.description: Framework-agnostic API design doctrine for transport selection, contract design, errors, auth boundaries, pagination, versioning, and review work.

plugins.name: api-design-drf
plugins.description: Django REST Framework adapter for implementing API contracts with serializers, permissions, pagination, drf-spectacular, and stable error handling.
